query: SELECT CONCAT(id, '|', COALESCE(name,'NULL'), '|', COALESCE(email,'NULL'), '|', role, '|', COALESCE(CAST(partnerId AS CHAR),'NULL')) as info FROM users WHERE role IN ('PARTNER', 'PARTNER_ADMIN', 'PARTNER_USER');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT CONCAT(id, '|', COALESCE(name,'NULL'), '|', COALESCE(email,'NULL'), '|', role, '|', COALESCE(CAST(partnerId AS CHAR),'NULL')) as info FROM users WHERE role IN ('PARTNER', 'PARTNER_ADMIN', 'PARTNER_USER');
